title: dombeya ivohibeensis subsp. ivohibeensis
intro: Dombeya ivohibeensis subsp. ivohibeensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the Ivohibe silk-floss tree or Dombeya silk-floss tree. The plant has been reported to have medicinal properties, particularly in its bark and roots, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Dombeya ivohibeensis subsp. ivohibeensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infections. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the bark and roots are boiled or steeped in hot water to create a herbal remedy.
